blocks.label: Site Cabins & Containers

variables.label: Rental period
variables.delegateText: State minimum rental period and weekly/monthly rates.

blocks.label: Sanitary Facilities
Site Fencing & Security
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall provide temporary site fencing:

Fencing type: {{fenceType}}
Estimated perimeter: {{fenceLength}} m
Gates: {{gateQty}} × {{gateWidth}} m wide
Minimum height: {{fenceHeight}} m

Fencing shall be stable, self-supporting, and comply with local requirements.
Delivery, installation, and removal: included in price.

blocks.label: Applicable Standards
blocks.text:
All facilities shall comply with:

- Arbobesluit (Working Conditions Decree) — site facility requirements
- Bouwbesluit 2012 (where applicable to temporary structures)
- NEN 3140 (electrical safety)
- Local municipal requirements for temporary structures

The Supplier shall hold valid VCA* or VCA** certification.
All units shall be CE marked where applicable.

Attach: VCA certificate, unit specifications, electrical safety certificates.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Per unit per period:
- Site office: per week / per month
- Storage container: per week / per month
- Canteen unit: per week / per month
- Toilet unit: per week (including cleaning and waste removal)

One-off costs:
- Delivery and placement: lump sum
- Collection and removal: lump sum
- Electrical connection per unit: lump sum
- Furniture package per unit: lump sum
overrides.ch5_surchargeItems:
- Extension of rental period: rate per additional week
- Additional relocations within site
- Weekend or evening delivery/collection
- Additional cleaning visits
- Damage repair
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
- Permanent electrical supply to site boundary
- Water supply connection
- Ground preparation / hardstanding for unit placement
- Building permits for temporary structures
- Security services / CCTV monitoring
- VAT
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
1. Price schedule per unit per period
2. Unit specifications and dimensions
3. VCA certificate (valid)
4. Electrical safety certificates
5. Insurance certificate
6. Delivery and placement timeline
7. General terms and conditions
8. All deviations with justification
